allow: Bash(grep -v "TS6305\\|TS6306\\|The file is\\|Matched by\\|Output file\\|Root file\\|^$\\|  ")
PowerShell(cd "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match '^.+\\\(\\d+,\\d+\\\): error' })
PowerShell(cd "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match '^.+\\\(\\d+,\\d+\\\): error' -and $_ -notmatch 'TS6305|TS6306' })
PowerShell(cd "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match 'error TS' -and $_ -notmatch 'TS6305|TS6306' })
PowerShell(cd "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'TS6305|The file is in the program|Matched by default' } | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(cd "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist\\apps\\mobile"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'TS6305|The file is in the program|Matched by default' } | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(cd "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist\\apps\\mobile" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; Write-Host "Exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in ['netinfo','nativewind','reanimated','expo']\)]")

PowerShell(try { $json = Get-Content "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist\\node_modules\\@shopify\\flash-list\\package.json" -ErrorAction Stop | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.version } catch { Write-Output "Not found" })

PowerShell(try { $json = Get-Content "F:\\Expo Projects\\Vacationist\\node_modules\\@react-native-community\\netinfo\\package.json" -ErrorAction Stop | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.version } catch { Write-Output "Not found" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c\) for client in d['client'] for c in [client.get\('oauth_client', []\)]]")
Bash(sed -i '738s/const { t } = useTranslation.*$/const { t } = useTranslation\("transfer"\);\\n  const { t: tCommon } = useTranslation\("common"\);/' "apps/mobile/app/trip/[id]/transfer.tsx")
Bash(sed -i '881s/const { t } = useTranslation.*$/const { t } = useTranslation\("transfer"\);\\n  const { t: tCommon } = useTranslation\("common"\);/' "apps/mobile/app/trip/[id]/transfer.tsx")

Bash(sed -i 's/const title = i18nInstance.t\(`notifications:nudge.\\${key}.title`\) as string as string;/const title = \(i18nInstance.t as \(k: string\) => string\)\(`notifications:nudge.\\${key}.title`\);/' "apps/mobile/src/features/notifications/components/NudgeSheet.tsx")

Bash(sed -i 's/const body = i18nInstance.t\(`notifications:nudge.\\${key}.body`\) as string as string;/const body = \(i18nInstance.t as \(k: string\) => string\)\(`notifications:nudge.\\${key}.body`\);/' "apps/mobile/src/features/notifications/components/NudgeSheet.tsx")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const wVitest = lock.packages['apps/mobile/node_modules/vitest']; const rVitest = lock.packages['node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('workspace-specific vitest:', wVitest ? wVitest.version : 'none \(hoisted to root\)'\); console.log\('root vitest:', rVitest ? rVitest.version : 'not found'\);")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lock.packages\).filter\(k => k.includes\('vitest'\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,20\)\);")
